title: Anthropic says US must stay ahead of China as AGI nears in 2028
description: AI company Anthropic has issued a stark warning about the global race for artificial intelligence, arguing that the United States must stay ahead of China as increasingly powerful systems approach. The company claims the next few years could determine whether AI strengthens democratic values or becomes a tool for mass surveillance and control.
content: The battle over artificial intelligence is no longer just about smarter chatbots or faster software. Increasingly, it is being framed as a geopolitical struggle that could shape military power, global influence and even the future of democratic socie... [3800 chars]

title: From reducing friction to building sovereign AI, India Innovation Day by TiE Delhi-NCR maps India’s AI ambitions
description: India is accelerating leadership in artificial intelligence, including the development of indigenous AI infrastructure, foundation and language models, and globally competitive AI-native companies. Over 55,200 startups have been recognised in FY 2025–26, marking more than 50% year-on-year growth, and DeepTech funding rising 37% to $2.3 billion.
content: As India continues its rapid startup expansion, with over 55,200 startups recognised in FY 2025–26, marking more than 50% year-on-year growth, and DeepTech funding rising 37% to $2.3 billion, the 15th edition of iDay reinforced the country’s transiti... [5841 chars]

title: Nvidia earnings in focus: Can the AI rally continue?
description: Nvidia has become the biggest symbol of the global artificial intelligence boom. Investors across the world are closely watching its quarterly earnings to understand whether AI-driven demand can continue at the current pace. The company’s results are expected to influence sentiment across technology stocks, especially semiconductor and AI-related companies. Markets are also focused on data-center growth and future AI infrastructure spending trends. (Sources: Morningstar, Investopedia, TheStreet, Barron's) Why Nvidia Earnings Matter
content: Nvidia has become the biggest symbol of the global artificial intelligence boom. Investors across the world are closely watching its quarterly earnings to understand whether AI-driven demand can continue at the current pace. The company’s results are... [3391 chars]

title: Applications Closing Soon: Last Chance to Join India's Premier AI Institute for the 2026 Batch
description: Pune (Maharashtra) [India], May 18: With artificial intelligence rapidly reshaping industries, education choices are increasingly being guided by future employability and technological relevance. For students aspiring to build careers at the intersection of technology, business, and innovation, the application window for the 2026 intake at the Symbiosis Artificial Intelligence Institute (SAII), Pune, is entering its final phase. The institute has announced that applications for the 2026 batch will close on 18th May 2026, making this the last opportunity for eligible students to apply during this admission cycle.

title: Global markets this week: War, AI & rising economic risks
description: The Iran conflict is entering its 12th week with no visible resolution in sight. Rising oil prices, inflation worries and bond-market volatility are becoming major concerns for policymakers and investors. Despite these risks, global equity markets continue to remain strong, driven largely by enthusiasm around artificial intelligence and technology stocks. (Source: Reuters) Iran War, AI Rally & Central Bank Concerns

title: America’s business schools are dangling discounts to win back students as AI panic sets in
description: American business schools are slashing tuition fees and offering scholarships. This move comes as professionals reconsider the value of traditional MBA degrees due to artificial intelligence. Many are opting for shorter, flexible courses to gain AI skills while staying employed. Applications to US business schools have also seen a decline.

title: Curry house owner caught out by AI in £50k battle with the taxman
description: A judge has warned against using artificial intelligence to build a legal argument after the technology was found to have invented cases
content:
A restaurateur who tried to argue against a tax fine was caught out because he used AI that had “hallucinated” rulings that did not exist.
Omar Rafique, who ran the Karma Lounge in Worthing, lost his appeal against a £51,200 VAT bill, but narrowly es... [3492 chars]

title: Checks in 90 countries on deposits, POS systems, real estate, social media, and assets by the AADE for Greek tax evasion
description: The AADE is activating an unprecedented system of electronic cross-checks and “smart” audits using artificial intelligence and big data for 2026.
